testcase.name: CartRepository_FindAllCarts

Hibernate: create table cart (id bigint generated by default as identity, date varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, total_discount float(53) not null, total_price float(53) not null, total_price_discount float(53) not null, user_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table item (id bigint generated by default as identity, item_name varchar(255) not null, price float(53) not null, quantity integer not null, cart_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table storage (id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255), price float(53) not null, quantity integer not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table user (id bigint generated by default as identity, category tinyint not null check (category between 0 and 1), customerid bigint not
